ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the route */,
  "route_start_time" TEXT /* The usual start time of the route */,
  "route_end_time" TEXT /* The usual end time of the route */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., every 15 minutes) */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., full-week, weekday-only) */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the service */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the service */,
  "service_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the service (e.g., daily, every other day) */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* ID of the route the trip belongs to */,
  "service_id" TEXT /* ID of the service the trip belongs to */,
  "trip_headsign" TEXT /* Headsign of the trip (e.g., to Airport) */,
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Direction of the trip (0 or 1) */,
  "block_id" TEXT /* ID of the block the trip belongs to */,
  "trip_start_time" TEXT /* The scheduled start time of the trip */,
  "trip_end_time" TEXT /* The scheduled end time of the trip */,
  "trip_actual_start_time" TEXT /* The actual start time of the trip */,
  "trip_actual_end_time" TEXT /* The actual end time of the trip */,
  "trip_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "trip_status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "block_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the block */,
  "block_start_location" TEXT /* The starting location of the block */,
  "block_end_location" TEXT /* The ending location of the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "driver_license" TEXT /* The driver's license number */,
  "driver_phone" TEXT /* The driver's phone number */,
  "driver_hire_date" TEXT /* The date the driver was hired */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* The make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* The model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* The year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* ID of the trip being assigned */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the trip */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, completed, canceled) */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_assignments_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., dispatcher, driver, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* The user's password (hashed for security) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* The last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* ID of the trip affected by the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_resolution_date" TEXT /* The date the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., 1 for high, 2 for medium, 3 for low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_alerts_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
